services.name: App Service
services.description: Hosts the enterprise RAG web/API application.

services.name: Azure AI Foundry
services.description: Orchestrates RAG workflow, prompt construction, and tool routing.

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.description: Runs GPT-5 generation for grounded responses.

services.name: Azure Cognitive Search
services.description: Performs hybrid vector and keyword retrieval over indexed enterprise content.

services.name: Azure Cache for Redis
services.description: Provides semantic caching for prior prompts, retrieved context, and responses.

services.name: Microsoft Entra ID
services.description: Authenticates users and issues tokens for app access control.

services.name: Azure Monitor
services.description: Collects application metrics, traces, and alert signals.

services.name: Log Analytics
services.description: Stores and queries centralized operational logs.

connections.label: Authenticate enterprise users and issue OAuth/OIDC tokens
Submit user query and conversation context for RAG orchestration
Check semantic cache for matching prompt-context signature
Return cached grounded answer when similarity threshold is met
Execute hybrid vector plus keyword retrieval for top-k evidence
Return ranked passages and metadata for grounding
Send grounded prompt to GPT-5 for answer synthesis with citations
Return generated completion and citation-ready output
Store semantic cache entry for prompt, retrieved chunks, and final response
Return final grounded response to client channel
Publish request latency, token usage, and failure telemetry
Ingest platform logs and metrics for centralized analysis

workflow.description: User signs in through the application using enterprise identity.
Application forwards authenticated query and context to orchestration.
Orchestration checks semantic cache and optionally serves a cached grounded response.
On cache miss or low-confidence hit, orchestration performs hybrid retrieval over enterprise index.
Retrieved evidence is injected into a grounded prompt for GPT-5 generation.
Generated answer is returned to orchestration, stored in semantic cache, and sent back to the app.
Application delivers the final response to the user and emits telemetry to centralized monitoring.

metadata.prompt: An enterprise RAG application with Azure AI Foundry for orchestration, Azure AI Search with hybrid vector and keyword retrieval, Azure OpenAI GPT-5 for generation, Azure Cache for Redis for semantic caching, and App Service with Entra ID authentication
